posts.title: Yankees 1, Dodgers 2: One Slider to Muncy Undoes a Cole Gem
posts.excerpt: Max Muncy's 416-foot homer off Gerrit Cole in the seventh sent the Yankees to a 2-1 series-opening loss to the Dodgers.

posts.title: Ben Rice's 8th-Inning Triple Caps a Sweep in Washington
posts.excerpt: Ben Rice's go-ahead triple in the 8th lifted the Yankees past the Nats 5-3, completing a sweep and stretching the win streak to four before the break.

posts.title: Three Straight Homers in the 8th Lift Yankees Past Nationals, 4-2
posts.excerpt: Down 2-0 into the 8th, the Yankees crushed three straight homers off the Nationals bullpen to erase the deficit and win Game 2, 4-2.

posts.title: Ben Rice's Two Homers, Five RBI Power Yankees Past Rays 12-4
posts.excerpt: Ben Rice homered twice and drove in five as the Yankees routed the Rays 12-4, salvaging a split of the four-game series.

posts.title: Jonathan Aranda Does It Again: Rays Blank Yankees 3-0, Boone Ejected
posts.excerpt: Jonathan Aranda drove in all three runs as the Rays blanked the Yankees 3-0, and Aaron Boone got tossed for good measure.

posts.title: Yankees Have Shown Past Interest In Hunter Goodman
posts.excerpt: The Yankees are looking for catching help and Hunter Goodman of the Rockies is a speculative trade candidate. Jorge Castillo of ESPN reports that the Yankees have called the Rockies about Goodman, although not recently.
